title: DisplayMessage construction boilerplate duplicated ~30 times (DRY)
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

Dimension: DRY
Location: src/tui/app.rs — every slash-command arm and event handler builds: DisplayMessage { role: system.to_string(), content: ..., tool_name: None, is_error: false, is_thinking: false }. Counted 30+ occurrences.
Violation: Every branch repeats the same five-field literal, differing only in role/content/is_error. Any future field addition requires touching 30 sites.
Mandated Refactor: After finding #275 lands, add constructors impl DisplayMessage { pub fn info, error, user, assistant, tool_ok, tool_err, thinking }. Collapses 7-line literal blocks into one-liners. Reduces tui/app.rs by ~400 lines.
